parameters.jsCode:
const submission = $input.first().json.text;
const studentName = $input.first().json.metadata.studentName || 'Student';
const studentId = $input.first().json.metadata.studentId || 'N/A';

const prompt = `Provide formative feedback on this CRM exam draft.

STUDENT: ${studentName} (${studentId})

SUBMISSION:
${submission}

RUBRIC:
Part 1 (35 pts): Customer Experience Analysis
- Q1 (12 pts): Experience documentation with specific details
- Q2a (8 pts): Relationship opportunities linked to course concepts
- Q2b (8 pts): Communication behaviors with examples
- Q2c (7 pts): Technology analysis with course principles

Part 2 (35 pts): Service Recovery
- Q1 (20 pts): Recovery script with specific techniques
- Q2 (15 pts): Video justification (check if link provided)

Part 3 (30 pts): Strategy Proposal
- Q1 (18 pts): Resource-constrained strategy (≤$5000, ≤40 hours)
- Q2 (8 pts): Team management approach
- Q3 (4 pts): Personal reflection

Provide:
1. Brief feedback for each part (3-5 sentences)
2. Specific strengths (2-3 items)
3. Areas for improvement (2-3 items)
4. Suggested next steps

Return as JSON:
{
  "student_name": "string",
  "feedback": {
    "part1": "string",
    "part2": "string",
    "part3": "string"
  },
  "strengths": ["string"],
  "improvements": ["string"],
  "next_steps": ["string"]
}
`;

return { json: { prompt, studentName, studentId } };
